channel.title: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament
channel.description: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament

item.title: Opinion Poll by Ipsos for Dagens Nyheter, 12–25 May 2026 – Seating Plan Projection
item.description:
Seating plan projection for the European Parliament
11 seats needed for a majority
Opinion poll by Ipsos for Dagens Nyheter, 12–25 May 2026
Details on https://filipvanlaenen.github.io/swedish_ep_polls/2026-05-25-Ipsos.html
